messages.content: Am I on track this month?

goldenReply: Haan, abhi toh track pe ho! ₹4,650 kharch hua hai ₹20,000 ke budget mein — yani sirf 23% gaya hai. Kaafi room bacha hai mahine mein.

messages.content: how much over budget am i

goldenReply: ₹1,500 over ho gaye ho. Budget tha ₹5,000, aur flight pe ₹6,500 kharch ho gaya — toh ₹1,500 ka overshoot hai.
